completion_promises.criterion_text: build_autobuild_state_initialiser(sqlite_pool) returns a Protocol-conforming object whose initialise(...) writes lifecycle="starting" per DDR-006.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented build_autobuild_state_initialiser(sqlite_pool) in src/forge/cli/_serve_deps_state_channel.py. Factory returns a _SqliteAutobuildStateInitialiser instance whose initialise_autobuild_state(...) method satisfies the runtime-checkable AutobuildStateInitialiser Protocol from forge.pipeline.dispatchers.autobuild_async (verified by isinstance check in TestFactoryReturnsProtocolImplementation::test_factory_returns_runtime_checkable_protocol_implementation). The method writes lifecycle='starting' to the async_tasks SQLite mirror table; the value is constrained at the boundary by AUTOBUILD_STARTING_LIFECYCLE re-exported from the dispatcher module (DDR-006 lifecycle literal).

completion_promises.criterion_text: A read after initialise returns the row with lifecycle="starting".
completion_promises.evidence: TestRoundTripWriteThenRead::test_initialise_then_read_observes_starting_row writes via the factory-built initialiser and reads back via read_autobuild_state on the same SqliteLifecyclePersistence pool, asserting row.lifecycle == AUTOBUILD_STARTING_LIFECYCLE plus all six identifier columns. test_read_uses_fresh_connection_on_disk_db additionally opens an independent read_only_connect handle on the same on-disk file (per ADR-ARCH-013) and confirms the WAL-mode write is visible to a fully separate ro reader.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No transition writes happen inside the initialiser — only the initial-state write.
completion_promises.evidence: Three assertions cover this. (a) test_initialise_rejects_non_starting_lifecycle asserts the initialiser raises ValueError for any lifecycle != 'starting' — the boundary check refuses to smuggle a transition through the initial-state seam. (b) test_only_one_row_per_task_id_after_single_initialise asserts COUNT(*) == 1 in async_tasks after a single initialise call. (c) test_initialiser_object_exposes_only_protocol_method asserts the public method set is exactly {'initialise_autobuild_state'}, so no transition/advance/update method exists. (d) test_repeated_reads_continue_to_observe_starting asserts three sequential reads all return lifecycle='starting' without any subagent involvement.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check src/forge/cli/_serve_deps_state_channel.py tests/cli/test_serve_deps_state_channel.py reports 'All checks passed!'. ruff format was applied so 'ruff format --check' is green. Files use from __future__ import annotations, type hints, snake_case, f-strings, context managers, and Black-compatible 88-col formatting per the project code-style rule.
